summary: Iteration 20: Google OAuth Integration Testing - All tests pass. Verified: 1) Google OAuth login button visible on login page with 'Mit Google anmelden' text, 2) /api/auth/google/login returns 302 redirect to accounts.google.com with correct OAuth params (client_id, redirect_uri, scope=openid+email+profile), 3) Standard email/password login works correctly with session cookie creation, 4) /api/auth/me returns user data for authenticated sessions, 5) Session persists across requests and logout clears session.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user marc.hansen@canusa.de for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google OAuth integration fully tested. Note: Full OAuth flow (actual Google login) cannot be tested automatically - only endpoint availability, redirects, and button UI were tested. The /api/auth/google/callback endpoint redirects to /login?error=google_auth_failed when called without valid OAuth code (expected behavior).

endpoints_tested: GET /api/auth/google/callback - Handles OAuth callback (tested error case)
GET /api/auth/me - Returns user data with session
frontend_elements_tested: Google OAuth button (data-testid='google-login-button') - visible with Google logo
Standard login form (email, password inputs) - functional
oauth_testing_notes.limitation: Cannot test complete OAuth flow as it requires actual Google account interaction
